seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Major update adds /side conversations for temporary modal queries, end-of-turn diff summaries, archived remote threads, one-tap model switching, Spotlight/Shortcuts integration, image handling, and desktop parity features for seamless mobile AI coding workflows.

global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Enables AI agents to form real companies end-to-end: generate EIN, open bank accounts, issue cards, and handle money via single prompt; integrates with Claude, Cursor, ChatGPT, Gemini for autonomous business operations.

24/7 AI sales agent system using seven autonomous sub-agents (market research, ICP, prospecting, email writing, sequencing, follow-ups) with pre-warmed mailboxes, 97% deliverability, and 15x lower cost than traditional tools for outbound automation.
Adds Prediction Market Skills and CLI allowing AI agents to browse events, analyze probabilities, and trade via natural language with secure app-based auth and controls.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Companies facing 45% price increases and $100M+ bills from token-heavy models like Opus, highlighting efficiency challenges in production AI usage.
near_misses.reason: Discusses costs but lacks specific new tool, repo, or architectural innovation.
